meaning: v.嘎扎嘎扎的咬嚼,压碎,扎扎地踏过n.咬碎,咬碎声,扎扎地踏
examples: The crunch came when she returned from America.
Iceland, the first nation to go bankrupt in the credit crunch.
There is absolutely no credit crunch on the main streets of small businesses.
The Fed is trying to prevent the credit crunch from turning into a complete credit freeze.
Taking advantage of those anomalies proved difficult at the height of the credit crunch.
